nutshell.headline: QA infra issues — 46 failures (43 new)
bullets: 96.2% pass · #3.0.2631 · 38m 15s, faster than #3.0.2630 · was 2 fails prior
nutshell.investigation: 44/46 look like QA 502/504 (dk-project-feasibility-data-store, dk-project-quota-details-rest) — likely infra during the run, not a broad product regression. Also: GB+[en,fr] still rejected (QuotaGroup E2E) — use CA for multi-lang.
